'''dhapana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockyard|dockyard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockyard|dockyard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhapana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæpænæth|dhæpænæth]] || [[word:dhæpænæj|dhæpænæj]] || [[word:dhæpænæsh|dhæpænæsh]] || [[word:dhæpænæ|dhæpænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapapanath|dhapapanath]] || [[word:dhapapanaj|dhapapanaj]] || [[word:dhapapanash|dhapapanash]] || [[word:dhapapana|dhapapana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapanath|dhapanath]] || [[word:dhapanaj|dhapanaj]] || [[word:dhapanash|dhapanash]] || [[word:dhapana|dhapana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapafnath|dhapafnath]] || [[word:dhapafnaj|dhapafnaj]] || [[word:dhapafnash|dhapafnash]] || [[word:dhapafnaf|dhapafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhapanatha|dhapanatha]] || [[word:dhapanaja|dhapanaja]] || [[word:dhapanasha|dhapanasha]] || [[word:dhapanaka|dhapanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhapanath|dhapanath]] || [[word:dhapanaj|dhapanaj]] || [[word:dhapanash|dhapanash]] || [[word:dhapana|dhapana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhapanathal|dhapanathal]] || [[word:dhapanajal|dhapanajal]] || [[word:dhapanashal|dhapanashal]] || [[word:dhapanakal|dhapanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhapanathatha|dhapanathatha]] || [[word:dhapanajaja|dhapanajaja]] || [[word:dhapanashasha|dhapanashasha]] || [[word:dhapanaka|dhapanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhapanathan|dhapanathan]] || [[word:dhapanajan|dhapanajan]] || [[word:dhapanashan|dhapanashan]] || [[word:dhapanakan|dhapanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhapanathaoro|dhapanathaoro]] || [[word:dhapanajaoro|dhapanajaoro]] || [[word:dhapanashaoro|dhapanashaoro]] || [[word:dhapanakaoro|dhapanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
